title: Task 9: Input component

close_reason: Implemented Input component with themed styling, placeholder, disabled state, and event callbacks

description: Textarea wrapping TextareaRenderable. Multi-line, configurable rows, signal binding. Files: src/starui_tui/textarea.py, tests/test_starui_tui/test_textarea.py
close_reason: Implemented Textarea component wrapping OpenTUI Textarea with theme styling

title: Task 11: Label + Typography
description: Label as styled Text. Typography: H1-H4 (bold), P, InlineCode (inverse/dim), Muted (dim), Small. Files: src/starui_tui/label.py, src/starui_tui/typography.py, tests/test_starui_tui/test_typography.py
close_reason: Implemented Label + Typography: H1-H4, P, Lead, Large, Small, Muted, InlineCode

description: Checkbox [x]/[ ] with signal. RadioGroup + RadioGroupItem (o)/( ) with exclusive selection. Files: src/starui_tui/checkbox.py, src/starui_tui/radio_group.py, tests/test_starui_tui/test_checkbox.py
close_reason: Implemented Checkbox [x]/[ ] and RadioGroup (o)/( ) with Signal support

title: Task 13: Select component
description: Select with SelectTrigger, SelectContent, SelectItem using inject_context. Dropdown with signal for selected value. Files: src/starui_tui/select.py, tests/test_starui_tui/test_select.py
close_reason: Implemented Select with SelectItem, trigger display, placeholder, Signal binding

title: Task 14: Switch + Toggle
description: Switch ON/OFF toggle with signal. Toggle + ToggleGroup with variant/size support. Files: src/starui_tui/switch.py, src/starui_tui/toggle.py, tests/test_starui_tui/test_switch.py
close_reason: Implemented Switch [●○]/[○●] and Toggle with pressed state styling

title: Task 15: Progress + Separator
description: Progress bar (ASCII: [████░░░░] 40%). Separator horizontal/vertical line. Files: src/starui_tui/progress.py, src/starui_tui/separator.py, tests/test_starui_tui/test_progress.py
close_reason: Implemented Progress bar [████░░░░] and Separator (horizontal/vertical)

title: Task 16: Table + subcomponents
description: Table, TableHeader, TableBody, TableRow, TableHead, TableCell rendering ASCII grid with borders. Auto column widths. Files: src/starui_tui/table.py, tests/test_starui_tui/test_table.py

title: Task 17: Tabs with context injection
description: Tabs, TabsList, TabsTrigger, TabsContent using inject_context. Active tab highlighting, conditional content. Files: src/starui_tui/tabs.py, tests/test_starui_tui/test_tabs.py

title: Task 18: Accordion with context injection
description: Accordion single/multiple mode with AccordionItem, AccordionTrigger, AccordionContent. Collapsible option. Files: src/starui_tui/accordion.py, tests/test_starui_tui/test_accordion.py

title: Task 1: starui_tui package skeleton + theme dict
description: Create starui_tui Python package with pyproject.toml, __init__.py, and TUI_THEME dict mapping (component, variant_axis, variant_value) tuples to OpenTUI Renderable props. Include entries for button, card, badge, alert, input, separator, progress, tabs. Files: src/starui_tui/__init__.py, src/starui_tui/theme.py, tests/test_starui_tui/test_theme.py
close_reason: Implemented: starui_tui package with TUI_THEME dict (24 tests passing)

title: Task 19: Dialog + AlertDialog
description: Dialog as centered overlay Box with signal open/close. DialogTrigger, DialogContent, DialogClose, DialogHeader, DialogFooter. AlertDialog as confirmation variant. Files: src/starui_tui/dialog.py, tests/test_starui_tui/test_dialog.py

title: Task 20: Toast notification system
description: toast() queues notifications with auto-dismiss, variants (default/success/error/warning). Container at bottom-right. Files: src/starui_tui/toast.py, tests/test_starui_tui/test_toast.py

title: Task 21: Breadcrumb + Pagination
description: Breadcrumb trail (Home > Section > Page). Pagination with Prev/Next/Links. Files: src/starui_tui/breadcrumb.py, src/starui_tui/pagination.py, tests/test_starui_tui/test_breadcrumb.py

title: Task 22: Command palette
description: Command with CommandInput, CommandList, CommandGroup, CommandItem. Search filtering + keyboard nav (up/down/enter). Files: src/starui_tui/command.py, tests/test_starui_tui/test_command.py

title: Task 23: SQLite data layer
description: opencode/db/ with SQLite models (sessions, messages, file_changes). DataStore CRUD: create_session, add_message, list_sessions, get_messages. Auto-migration. Files: src/opencode/db/store.py, tests/test_opencode/test_db.py

title: Task 24: LiteLLM provider with streaming
description: LLMProvider wrapping LiteLLM acompletion(). Streaming responses, tool definitions, model switching, error handling. Files: src/opencode/ai/provider.py, tests/test_opencode/test_provider.py

title: Task 25: Agent tool system
description: File tools (read/write/search/glob), shell tool (execute+timeout), search tool (grep/rg). Tool registry for LiteLLM format. Files: src/opencode/ai/tools/{file,shell,search}.py, tests/test_opencode/test_tools.py

title: Task 26: MCP client integration
description: MCPClient connecting to MCP servers via stdio transport. List tools, call tools, manage lifecycle. Files: src/opencode/mcp/client.py, tests/test_opencode/test_mcp.py

title: Task 27: File watcher + git integration
description: File watcher (watchdog) emitting signals on changes. Git ops via subprocess (status/diff/log). Respects .gitignore. Files: src/opencode/fs/watcher.py, src/opencode/fs/git.py, tests/test_opencode/test_fs.py

title: Task 28: TUI main layout
description: main_layout() composing toolbar, sidebar, tabbed content (chat/editor/diff), input area, status bar. Uses starui_tui Tabs. Files: src/opencode/tui/layout.py, tests/test_opencode/test_layout.py

title: Task 2: TUI Signal adapter
description: Implement TUI-mode Signal class with get/set/subscribe/notify. Pure Python reactive state (no JS compilation). Include computed() for derived signals and effect() for side-effects. API matches StarHTML Signal (set, add, toggle, __call__). Files: src/starui_tui/signals.py, tests/test_starui_tui/test_signals.py
close_reason: Implemented: Signal, computed, effect (23 tests passing)

title: Task 29: Chat panel
description: Chat message list with user/assistant differentiation, markdown formatting (bold/italic/code), fenced code blocks, streaming animation. Files: src/opencode/tui/components/chat.py, tests/test_opencode/test_chat.py

title: Task 30: Input area
description: Multiline input: Enter=send, Shift+Enter=newline, Up/Down=history, /command autocomplete. Files: src/opencode/tui/components/input.py, tests/test_opencode/test_input_area.py

title: Task 31: Editor panel + diff viewer
description: Read-only code viewer with syntax coloring. Side-by-side/unified diff with green additions, red deletions. Files: src/opencode/tui/components/{editor,diff}.py, tests/test_opencode/test_editor.py

title: Task 32: Session management + sidebar
description: Session list with timestamps/preview. Create/switch/delete sessions. Wired to SQLite. Files: src/opencode/tui/components/sidebar.py, tests/test_opencode/test_sidebar.py

title: Task 33: Keyboard shortcuts
description: Configurable keybindings: Ctrl+1/2/3 tabs, Ctrl+B sidebar, Ctrl+N new session, Ctrl+K command palette, vim j/k/g/G scroll. Files: src/opencode/tui/keybindings.py, tests/test_opencode/test_keybindings.py

title: Task 34: Configuration
description: Load ~/.opencode/config.toml: model, API keys, keybindings, theme colors, MCP servers. Env var overrides. Files: src/opencode/config.py, tests/test_opencode/test_config.py

description: Boot full TUI with mocked LLM, verify layout, send message through agent, verify response in chat, verify SQLite persistence. CLI entry point via Click. Files: src/opencode/app.py, tests/test_opencode/test_integration.py

title: OpenTUI Python Full API Parity

title: Phase 1: Foundation & Test Infrastructure
close_reason: Implemented Phase 1: FFI bindings complete, test_render() working, test framework created

title: Phase 2: Core API Parity
description: Implement Core API using nanobind bindings. Depends on Phase 1.5 migration.
close_reason: Implemented: EditBuffer/EditorView added, getSpanLines and TerminalCapabilities already in place

title: Phase 3: Component Parity
description: Implement Box, Text, Input components with full parity.
close_reason: Already implemented: Box, Text, Input, Textarea, Select, ScrollBox, Diff, Markdown, Code, Slider, TextTable, TabSelect all present in codebase

description: Implement animation, filters, and image rendering.
close_reason: Implemented: Added filters.py with ImageRenderer and filters, enhanced Timeline with Animation class

title: Phase 4: Advanced Features
close_reason: Implemented Phase 4: Advanced Features - Added full filter implementations (Grayscale, Blur, Brightness, Contrast, Sepia, Invert), FilterChain for chaining filters, and ImageRenderer with SIXEL/Kitty protocol support
